title: Coast-to-Coast L&E Series: Your Top Questions Answered - September 2025
content:
## Coast-to-Coast L&E Series: Your Top Questions Answered - September 2025
Join us for a webinar presentation as the National Labour and Employment team answers the most commonly asked questions that we have heard from you recently. Speakers: Lyann Danielak , Nathan Fournier , Sally Kim , Patrick Pengelly , Megan Pryor , Francis Racine , Ziad Shanab , Robert Steinman
Click here to subscribe to our latest blog posts.
Note: All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be forwarded a few days before the event.
This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education: This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec . For questions about this seminar, please contact: clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
